purpose: Locate the source of Round 55 controller sparsity using only already-consumed development evidence and predeclared consensus diagnostics.

allowed_intervals.policy_development: 2024-07-01T00:00:00Z through 2024-09-01T00:00:00Z, excluding decisions whose 61-minute realization crosses the end
allowed_intervals.development_holdout: 2024-09-01T00:00:00Z through 2024-10-01T00:00:00Z, excluding decisions whose 61-minute realization crosses the end

controllers.rule: A side is eligible only when every view's median-of-three prediction is positive, every view prefers that side to the opposite side, and at least two seeds in every view predict positive payoff.

Each view casts one side vote only when its median-of-three prediction is positive, it prefers that side, and at least two seeds predict positive payoff. Select a side when at least two views vote for it and fewer than two vote for the opposite side. The score is the median of the voting-view medians.

Pool the three views and three seeds. Select the side whose nine-model median is positive and exceeds the opposite-side median when at least six of nine predictions for that side are positive. The score is the selected nine-model median.

frozen_measurements: sequential eligibility attrition by treatment, interval, controller, symbol, and side
per-view vote patterns and seed-positive support
signals before risk cooldowns, closed trades, active days, stop frequency, and realized stress payoff
score quintile calibration using only selected rows
symbol PnL concentration and trade concentration

interpretation_contract.permitted_use: Mechanism diagnosis and the prior for a separately frozen future round only.
